mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.MATCHING_NUMBER AS matchinNumber, m.MATCHING_START AS matchingStart, m.MATCHING_STATE AS matchingState, m.MENTOR_NUMBER AS mentorNumber, m.MENTEE_NUMBER AS menteeNumber, m.SUBJECT_NUMBER AS subjectNumber, m.PAY_ID AS payId, t1.MEMBER_NAME AS mentorName, t2.MEMBER_NAME AS menteeName, s.SUBJECT_NAME AS subjectName, /* 1. 쉼표 추가 완료 */ p.PAY_AMOUNT AS payAmount, p.PAY_METHOD AS payMethod, p.PAY_DATE AS payDate, p.PAY_STATUS AS payStatus /* 2. DB에 이 컬럼명이 있는지 꼭 확인! */ FROM UB_MATCHING m JOIN UB_MEMBER t1 ON m.MENTOR_NUMBER = t1.MEMBER_NUMBER JOIN UB_MEMBER t2 ON m.MENTEE_NUMBER = t2.MEMBER_NUMBER JOIN UB_SUBJECT s ON m.SUBJECT_NUMBER = s.SUBJECT_NUMBER JOIN UB_PAY p ON m.PAY_ID = p.PAY_ID /* 3. JOIN 구문 추가 완료 */ WHERE (m.MENTOR_NUMBER = #{memberNumber} OR m.MENTEE_NUMBER = #{memberNumber}) AND m.MATCHING_STATE = '매칭중' ORDER BY m.MATCHING_START DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE UB_MATCHING SET MATCHING_STATE = '매칭 취소', MATCHING_CANCEL = SYSDATE, MATCHING_CAN_REASON = #{matchingCanReason} WHERE MATCHING_NUMBER = #{matchinNumber}
